title: Here's Why Prologis (PLD) Looks Ripe for Bottom Fishing
text: After losing some value lately, a hammer chart pattern has been formed for Prologis (PLD), indicating that the stock has found support. This, combined with an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions, could lead to a trend reversal for the stock in the near term.

title: Prologis appoints chief sustainability and energy officer
text: As companies react to pressure from their supply chains and customers to improve their sustainability metrics and reduce greenhouse gas emissions, more are adding sustainability executives to their C-suites. Logistics real estate provider Prologis appointed Susan Uthayakumar in the new role of chief sustainability and energy officer.
